commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: Seek God. Do not be like Asa the king of Judah, who after receiving many blessings from God fell so far that when he suffered lameness in his feet he would not seek God even though there was a prophet present. Commentary on Paul’s Epistles.

commentaries.author: Irenaeus of Lyons
commentaries.content: And, "There is none that understandeth, or that seeketh after God: they have all gone out of the way, they are together become unprofitable"

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
